name: KOSPI (Korea Composite Stock Index)
summary: Created 2026-05-12. KOSPI is the primary Korean equity benchmark; persistent index referenced repeatedly in graph for the Korean memory-fab + AI-semis + helium-supply cascade path. **KOSPI 7,690.59 May 12 (-1.7% 1D — first profit-taking session of cycle; +33.1% 1M / +39.3% 3M / +78% YTD into May 11).** The largest 30-day move in any major-market index in recent memory. **Crisis-linked cascade path: war → Qatar Ras Laffan offline → helium constraint → 4-week countdown to Korean fab buffer exhaustion (mid-June) → Samsung/SK Hynix production-halt risk.** **B9 HMM Namu forensics public May 11: Korean joint investigation confirmed strike by 2 unidentified aerial objects ~1 min apart at stern; mine + torpedo RULED OUT; SEOUL STOPPED SHORT OF PUBLICLY BLAMING IRAN — creating diplomatic friction with Trump.** Korea has gone from 'passive helium victim' to 'active diplomatic actor.' USD/KRW ₩1,488.28 (+1.9% 1D) on Korea-Iran-attribution friction + capital outflow. Crisis-linked share: ~40% (helium tail + HMM Namu + diplomatic friction); secular ~60% (AI capex super-cycle dominating Samsung +111% YTD / SK Hynix +144% YTD). **STILL MOST REVERSIBLE POSITION IN WORLD if helium buffers deplete past mid-June.** Watch level: KOSPI 7,500 hold within 5 sessions confirms Korea AI-bid intact despite diplomatic friction.

active_triggers.condition: KOSPI breaks below 7,500 sustained 3 sessions — confirms AI-bid cracking under diplomatic friction
Samsung or SK hynix announces production halt due to helium shortage by mid-June
active_triggers.note: Inherits from helium node — most time-sensitive trigger in graph; ~4 weeks remaining.

recent_signals.headline: KOSPI -1.7% 1D = FIRST PROFIT-TAKING SESSION OF CYCLE after extraordinary +33.1% 1M / +39.3% 3M / +78% YTD into May 11 — largest 30-day move in any major-market index in recent memory. Drivers: (1) HMM Namu forensics public May 11 — Seoul stopped short of publicly blaming Iran, creating diplomatic friction with Trump; (2) USD/KRW ₩1,488.28 +1.9% 1D on capital outflow; (3) mechanical profit-taking in a vertical market. Korea has gone from passive helium victim to active diplomatic actor. SMH $576.31 +1.7% 1D / +31.9% 1M; AI infrastructure CapEx demand from Microsoft/Meta/Amazon unbroken. Helium tail-risk timeline: Korean fab buffer ~4 weeks remaining to mid-June exhaustion. Tier-1 chipmaker production-halt falsification still HOLDS but window contracting.
sources: Seoul official briefing + Bloomberg + Insurance Journal + Korea Herald (HMM Namu forensics)
recent_signals.verification: KOSPI -1.7% to 7,690.59 = CONFIRMED yfinance multi-source; HMM Namu forensics + Seoul-Iran-attribution non-call = CONFIRMED (Seoul official briefing); USD/KRW ₩1,488.28 +1.9% 1D = CONFIRMED multi-source
